messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: benchmark_design_rigor
Attribute claim_validity: how much this increases the validity of any public benchmark claim

A (equal_dollar_budget): Run every method under a fixed provider-dollar cap and report how much agreement each method buys before the cap is exhausted.

B (failure_mode_taxonomy): Tag each disagreement by likely source: prompt ambiguity, reference brittleness, ratio-scale misuse, cost constraint, or genuine method weakness.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute, and how many times more? Use ratio=1 only for near ties; cap large gaps at 26. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","ratio":1.0,"confidence":0.0}.
